_fixture_meta.description: Technical persona exits XBI citing a decisive breakdown of the multi-month base with volume confirmation — medium-term structure broken, not single-bar noise.
_fixture_meta.provenance: hand-authored 2026-06-22; language mirrors technical.md HOLDING HORIZON clause (lines 62-78): 'primary trend reversal — confirmed breakdown of a major base, decisive break of a key support level on volume'

thesis_status.reason: XBI has broken decisively below the 18-month ascending base on three consecutive weekly closes with volume running 180% of the 52-week average. The relative-strength regime vs. SPY has deteriorated from outperform to confirmed underperform over the past 10 weeks. The medium-term primary trend has reversed — this is not a single bar printing against an intact trend, it is the structure itself that has broken. Exiting per holding-horizon discipline.
